summary: Full backend + frontend test of Ritri Auto Solution. 20/20 backend pytest pass (100%). Frontend public pages, catalog filtering/search, vehicle detail, gadai calculator, contact form, sticky WhatsApp, admin login/dashboard, vehicle CRUD dialog, and leads tab all working end-to-end. Created 5 test leads via UI which appeared correctly in admin dashboard.

issues: Seed image mismatch: 'Yamaha Aerox 155 ABS' card displays a green Kawasaki Ninja sportbike photo (and several other unit photos from Unsplash do not match the brand/model named in the title). Reduces trust on a marketplace site.

action_items: Replace mismatched stock Unsplash images in SEED_VEHICLES with photos that actually match each brand/model (e.g., real Aerox, Vario, Brio, Avanza photos).

Minor: logger is defined AFTER seed_data() startup hook in server.py (line 473 vs 444); seed_data uses logger.info inside a startup handler so it works at runtime, but it's brittle. Move logger setup above @app.on_event('startup').
Optional: admin token store is in-memory (ACTIVE_TOKENS dict) — tokens reset on every backend restart, forcing re-login. Fine for MVP but document/replace later.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is initialized below the startup seed handler; functionally OK because the handler runs after module load, but ordering is misleading.
ACTIVE_TOKENS in-memory dict means tokens are not persistent across restarts and not horizontally scalable.
No rate-limiting on public POST /api/leads — spam risk. Consider basic throttling or captcha.
Vehicle/Lead seed images sourced from Unsplash — most do not match the named model (e.g., Aerox = Ninja photo). Update assets.
test_credentials: Admin: username=admin, password=ritri2025 (from /app/backend/.env). No /app/memory/test_credentials.md file present.
seed_data_creation: Created 5 TEST_-prefixed leads via UI and API (TEST_Budi gadai, TEST_Andi beli, TEST_Citra kontak, TEST_Contact kontak, TEST_GadaiPW gadai, TEST_SurveyPW survey). Backend pytest also created+deleted TEST_Suzuki Ertiga vehicle and TEST_DEL lead in CRUD verify tests. Most TEST_ leads remain in DB — main agent may want to purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_ritri_backend.py covers health, vehicles list/filter/get/404, leads create (gadai/beli/kontak), admin login (success+401), admin auth-protected endpoints (me/stats/leads/vehicles CRUD), and verifies no _id leakage. Admin token store is in-memory so re-running tests is fine; tokens reset on backend restart. Frontend testids verified: hero-cta-catalog, sticky-whatsapp, vehicle-card-{id}, catalog-search, catalog-category (Select), catalog-sort, catalog-grid, vehicle-detail, detail-cta-whatsapp, detail-cta-survey, lead-form-dialog, lead-input-name/phone/type/message, lead-submit-button, gadai-page, calc-bpkb-type, calc-est-value, calc-pct-loan, calc-tenor, calc-monthly, calc-input-name/phone, calc-submit, contact-name/phone/message/submit, admin-username, admin-password, admin-login-submit, admin-stats, tab-vehicles, tab-leads, admin-add-vehicle, admin-row-{id}, admin-edit-{id}, admin-delete-{id}, lead-row-{id}, vehicle-form-dialog, vehicle-form-save. Slider value change via keyboard ArrowRight did not visibly move calc-monthly — likely Radix Slider needs page.locator('[role=slider]').focus then bigger keystrokes or drag; submission still works without changing sliders.
